Tests that the prototype of the prototype of an Object is null.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion that checks the prototype chain of a newly created `Object` in JavaScript. It verifies that the prototype of the prototype of an `Object` instance is `null`. This assertion confirms the fundamental behavior of JavaScript's prototype chain, where the root of the prototype chain is `null`. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of JavaScript's object prototype inheritance.
